basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Sr. Project Scientist Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) has released the official Sr. Project Scientist Notification 2026 at home.iitd.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the IIT Delhi Sr. Project Scientist Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with a Ph.D. in Textile Engineering or an M.Tech. in Textile Engineering, Textile Chemistry, or Fibre Science can attend the walk-in interview on 15 July 2026. The official notification PDF and walk-in interview details are available below.

age_limit.details: Age relaxation for SC/ST candidates is 5% relaxation of marks.

qualification.education_qualification: PhD in Textile Engineering. M.Tech in Textile Engineering/ Textile Chemistry/ Fibre Science.
qualification.details: PhD in Textile Engineering M.Tech in Textile Engineering M.Tech in Textile Chemistry M.Tech in Fibre Science

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Sr. Project Scientist Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Delhi Sr. Project Scientist Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.text: Age relaxation for SC/ST candidates is 5% relaxation of marks.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Sr. Project Scientist Salary 2026
IIT Delhi Sr. Project Scientist Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIT Delhi Sr. Project Scientist Selection Process 2026
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for IIT Delhi Sr. Project Scientist Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Sr. Project Scientist Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the IIT Delhi recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the IIT Delhi recruitment is Sr. Project Scientist. This is a project-based job opportunity for research professionals.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies announced?
faq.answer: A total of 1 vacancy has been announced for the Sr. Project Scientist position at IIT Delhi. This is a single opening for qualified candidates.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the Sr. Project Scientist post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a PhD in Textile Engineering or an M.Tech in Textile Engineering, Textile Chemistry, or Fibre Science to be eligible for this post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Sr. Project Scientist position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated pay-slab ranging from Rs. 60,750 to Rs. 79,260/- per month, based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q5. How can candidates apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the walk-in interview directly with all required documents.

faq.question: Q6. What is the date of the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Sr. Project Scientist position will be held on 15th July 2026. Candidates should report to the venue on time.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the walk-in interview venue located?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at Indian Institute of Technology Delhi, New Delhi - 110016. Specific details about the reporting room will be in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment. Candidates can attend the walk-in interview without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates bring for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must bring their formal application on Form No. IRD/REC-4, educational certificates, work experience details, a recent passport-size photograph, and original certificates for verification.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website to download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form (Form No. IRD/REC-4) can be downloaded from the IRD Website of IIT Delhi at http://ird.iitd.ac.in/rec.
